login.title: Login
login.body: Log in with your email and password. When you sign up, a verification email is sent — click the link to complete registration.

dashboard.title: Home (Dashboard)
dashboard.body: After login, the dashboard appears. See total cards, today's review cards, study streak, and mastery rate at a glance.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.body: Use the bottom tab bar to navigate between Home, Decks, Study, Marketplace, and Settings.

create.title: Create a Deck
create.body: On the Decks page, press the + button. Set the name, description, icon, and color.

detail.title: Deck Detail View
detail.body: Click a deck to see its card list. Use the top buttons to add cards, import, export, share, or edit the deck.

edit.title: Edit Deck
edit.body: Change the name, description, icon, color, and default template on the deck edit page.

delete.title: Delete Deck
delete.body: Press the delete button on the deck detail page. Deleting a deck also removes all its cards.

add.title: Add Cards
add.body: Press the + button on the deck detail page. Fill in the fields defined in the template.

editDelete.title: Edit & Delete Cards
editDelete.body: Tap a card in the list to edit. Modify field content and tags.

searchFilter.title: Search & Filter
searchFilter.body: Use the search bar to search across all fields. Select a status filter (new, learning, review) to view specific cards.

modes.title: Study Modes
modes.body:
SRS: Spaced repetition with 4 buttons (Again/Hard/Good/Easy).
Sequential Review: In order, mixing new + review cards.
Random: Randomly drawn cards.
Sequential: Cards in order.
By Date: Cards by upload date.

Sequential Review, Random, Sequential, By Date use 2 buttons (Unknown/Known).

Cramming: Intensive round-based review with 2 buttons (Missed/Got It). Does not affect SRS schedule.

science.title: The Science Behind SRS
science.body: SRS is based on the forgetting curve. By reviewing just before you forget, information moves to long-term memory. Cards you know well appear less often; cards you struggle with appear more frequently.

srsMethod.title: SRS Study Method
srsMethod.body:
Again (Red): "I didn't remember" — card reappears soon.
Hard (Orange): "Barely recalled" — shorter interval.
Good (Blue): "Remembered well" — normal interval.
Easy (Green): "Instant recall" — longer interval.

Tip: When in doubt, press Good.

sessionFlow.title: Study Session Flow
sessionFlow.body:
1. Select deck → Set study mode → Start
2. See card front → Tap to flip → Choose rating
3. After all cards, a summary shows study count, time, and rating distribution.

swipeMode.title: Swipe Mode
swipeMode.body:
Switch to Swipe mode in Settings to rate by swiping.
SRS: ← Again / → Good
Other modes: ← Unknown / → Known
Cramming: ← Missed / → Got It

cramming.title: Cramming Mode
cramming.body: All cards are presented. Missed cards reappear until mastered. Use card filters (All/Weak/Due Soon) and time limits. Does NOT affect SRS schedule.

jsonImport.title: JSON Import
jsonImport.body: On deck detail, tap Import → select a JSON file. Ideal for backup and restore.

csvImport.title: CSV Import
csvImport.body: CSV files from Excel can be imported. Column mapping matches fields automatically.

jsonExport.title: JSON Export
jsonExport.body: Deck detail → Export → JSON downloads the full deck as one file.

csvExport.title: CSV Export
csvExport.body: CSV format opens directly in Excel/Google Sheets.

copy.title: Copy Mode
copy.body: Gives an independent, editable copy. Original and copy don't affect each other.

subscribe.title: Subscribe Mode
subscribe.body: Recipients get auto-updates when you add cards. Study progress is independent.

snapshot.title: Snapshot Mode
snapshot.body: Creates a read-only copy at the current point in time.

what.title: What is the Marketplace?
what.body: Search and get decks shared by other users. Filter by category and tags.

getting.title: Getting a Deck
getting.body: Click a deck to preview cards, then press "Get" to add it to your decks.

publishing.title: Publishing Your Deck
publishing.body: Deck detail → Publish → Set title, description, category, and share mode.

viewing.title: Viewing Study History
viewing.body: View all study sessions by date on the History page. Filter by deck or mode.

dashboardStats.title: Dashboard Statistics
dashboardStats.body: Switch period tabs on the dashboard to view heatmap, daily study chart, and forecast.

profile.title: Profile
profile.body: Set your display name. Email cannot be changed.

srsLimit.title: SRS New Card Limit
srsLimit.body: Set the maximum number of new cards per SRS session.

answerMode.title: Answer Mode
answerMode.body: Button mode: Tap rating buttons. Swipe mode: Swipe cards to rate.

autoTts.title: Auto TTS
autoTts.body: Auto-reads TTS-enabled fields when flipping cards. Adjust speed with the slider (0.5x - 2.0x).

what.title: What is AI Auto-Generate?
what.body: Create flashcards automatically using AI. Enter a topic and AI generates everything for you.

apiKey.title: Setting Up API Key
apiKey.body: Get an API key from OpenAI or xAI. Enter it in AI Generate settings. Keys are stored locally.

fullGeneration.title: Full Generation
fullGeneration.body: Go to AI Generate → Enter topic → Set card count → Start. AI creates template, deck, and cards.

daily.title: Study a Little Every Day
daily.body: SRS is most effective with daily consistency. 10-20 minutes a day is enough.

again.title: Don't Be Afraid of Again
again.body: Honestly marking cards you don't remember as 'Again' helps the system. Forcing 'Good' reduces effectiveness.

concise.title: Keep Cards Concise
concise.body: Put just one concept per card. Short, clear cards are far more effective.

tags.title: Use Tags
tags.body: Add tags for quick filtering. Examples: 'grammar', 'verbs', 'Chapter1'.
